title: Conversation Intelligence Operator (All-in-One)
description: Consolidated schema for sentiment, intent, and summary analysis from Conversational Intelligence. Note: Twilio will automatically set all fields as required and additionalProperties to false.

summary.description: Conversation summary with key details. Required field: paragraph

paragraph.description: A concise paragraph summarizing the conversation (REQUIRED)

bullets.description: Key points from the conversation in bullet form (optional)

description.description: Description of the action item (REQUIRED for each item)

assignee.description: Who is responsible for this action (optional)

deadline.description: Deadline for completing the action item in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2026-01-30T17:00:00Z) (optional)

status.description: Status of the action item (optional, defaults to pending)

action_items.description: Action items identified from the conversation with deadlines and responsible parties (optional)

topics_discussed.description: Main topics covered in the conversation (optional)

outcome.description: The outcome or resolution of the conversation (optional)

next_best_action.description: Recommended next action to take based on the conversation (optional)

sentiment.description: Customer sentiment analysis. Required fields: overall, score

score.description: Sentiment score from 0 (very negative) to 100 (very positive) (REQUIRED, must be between 0-100)

confidence.description: Confidence score for the sentiment classification (optional, should be between 0-100 if provided)

key_phrases.description: Key phrases that influenced the sentiment analysis (optional)

sentiment.description: Sentiment at this point in time

over_time.description: Sentiment changes throughout the conversation with timestamps (optional)

classification.description: Intent classification and resolution tracking. Required field: primary_intent

primary_intent.description: The primary detected intent of the conversation (REQUIRED)

primary_confidence.description: Confidence score for the primary intent (optional, should be between 0-100 if provided)

secondary_intents.description: All detected secondary intents with confidence scores (optional)

intent.description: Intent at this point in time

trigger_phrase.description: Phrase that triggered this intent detection

intent_timeline.description: Timeline of intent changes during the conversation (optional)

resolution_status.description: Whether the customer's intent was resolved (optional)

quality.description: Quality assessment for virtual and human agents. Required field: virtual_agent

virtual_agent.description: Virtual agent quality metrics. Required field: quality_score

resolved_questions.description: Whether the virtual agent successfully resolved customer questions (optional)

avoided_hallucinations.description: Whether the virtual agent avoided making up information (optional)

avoided_repetitions.description: Whether the virtual agent avoided unnecessary repetitions (optional)

resolved_without_human.description: Whether the issue was resolved without human agent transfer (optional)

maintained_consistency.description: Whether the virtual agent maintained consistent information (optional)

quality_score.description: Overall quality score for virtual agent performance (REQUIRED, must be between 0-10, similar to CSAT)

human_agent.description: Human agent quality metrics (optional, only populate if conversation was transferred to human)

was_transferred.description: Whether the conversation was transferred to a human agent (optional)

resolved_questions.description: Whether the human agent successfully resolved customer questions (optional)

was_cordial.description: Whether the human agent maintained cordial and professional behavior (optional)

avoided_repetitions.description: Whether the human agent avoided unnecessary repetitions (optional)

resolved_problem.description: Whether the human agent resolved the customer's problem (optional)

clear_closing.description: Whether the human agent provided a clear closing to the conversation (optional)

quality_score.description: Overall quality score for human agent performance (optional, should be between 0-10 if provided, similar to CSAT)
